Saw the movie today, and it’s a hot steaming turd I’m sorry. No Lindsay Buckingham theme song, no clever use of songs to accompany artistic scenes slow-mo action scenes , putrid dialogue, Sharon Stone was aweful, Christopher Lloyd criminally underused. 
See it if you must, but I recommend just rewatching Nobody (1) (which I do every 6 mths)

So, you didnt even watch the movie, Everything you just said is wrong. no clever use of songs to accompany artistic scene - are you dumb? Tthe songs were perfect.
